name: user-benefits

scripts.package: pnpm buildcheck:all && pnpm type-check:all && pnpm lint:all && pnpm check-formatting:all && pnpm test:all && pnpm build && cd target && zip -qr user-benefits.zip ./*.js.map ./*.js
scripts.buildcheck:all: pnpm --filter identity buildcheck && pnpm --filter aws buildcheck && pnpm --filter logger buildcheck && pnpm --filter zuora buildcheck && pnpm --filter internationalisation buildcheck && pnpm --filter product-catalog buildcheck && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog buildcheck && pnpm --filter promotions buildcheck && pnpm --filter product-benefits buildcheck && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data buildcheck && pnpm --filter user-benefits buildcheck && pnpm buildcheck
scripts.type-check:all: pnpm --filter identity type-check && pnpm --filter aws type-check && pnpm --filter logger type-check && pnpm --filter zuora type-check && pnpm --filter internationalisation type-check && pnpm --filter product-catalog type-check && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog type-check && pnpm --filter promotions type-check && pnpm --filter product-benefits type-check && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data type-check && pnpm --filter user-benefits type-check && pnpm type-check
scripts.lint:all: pnpm --filter identity lint && pnpm --filter aws lint && pnpm --filter logger lint && pnpm --filter zuora lint && pnpm --filter internationalisation lint && pnpm --filter product-catalog lint && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog lint && pnpm --filter promotions lint && pnpm --filter product-benefits lint && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data lint && pnpm --filter user-benefits lint && pnpm lint
scripts.check-formatting:all: pnpm --filter identity check-formatting && pnpm --filter aws check-formatting && pnpm --filter logger check-formatting && pnpm --filter zuora check-formatting && pnpm --filter internationalisation check-formatting && pnpm --filter product-catalog check-formatting && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog check-formatting && pnpm --filter promotions check-formatting && pnpm --filter product-benefits check-formatting && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data check-formatting && pnpm --filter user-benefits check-formatting && pnpm check-formatting
scripts.test:all: pnpm --filter identity test && pnpm --filter aws test && pnpm --filter logger test && pnpm --filter zuora test && pnpm --filter internationalisation test && pnpm --filter product-catalog test && pnpm --filter zuora-catalog test && pnpm --filter promotions test && pnpm --filter product-benefits test && pnpm --filter supporter-product-data test && pnpm --filter user-benefits test && pnpm test
